agent.name: Samantha
agent.role: Ops HQ — field jobs, invoicing, same-day billing follow-up

schedule.description: After field day ends — 6:00 PM Pacific

rating_rules.A+: status PASS, zero invoice_gaps, every completed field job has invoice sent same day
rating_rules.A: status PASS, at most 1 invoice_gap OR all gaps are low-priority stale drafts

status_rules.PASS: All pull steps succeeded and invoice_gaps length is 0
status_rules.PARTIAL: Data pulled but invoice_gaps non-empty OR a non-critical step failed
status_rules.FAIL: Could not read ops sheet or a critical step failed
